tasks.title: Create requirements.txt for CI
tasks.description: Create requirements.txt with pandas, numpy, yfinance, scipy for GitHub Actions dependency install.

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions workflow with Pages deployment
tasks.description: Write .github/workflows/daily-scan.yml. Steps: checkout, setup Python, pip install, run daily_scan.py generating both latest.html and dated file, deploy reports/ to gh-pages branch using peaceiris/actions-gh-pages.

tasks.title: Configure GitHub Pages in repo settings
tasks.description: Enable GitHub Pages in repo Settings → Pages → Source: Deploy from branch gh-pages, folder / (root).

tasks.title: Test with manual workflow trigger
tasks.description: Push to main, manually trigger workflow, verify HTML report is deployed to Pages URL and accessible.
